instruction: Drag the pictures into the right order
modellingTip: Modelling Tip: Use time words like first, next, then, and finally while you talk through the story.

steps.label: Choose a banana
steps.altText: A child picks up a banana from a bowl of fruit.

steps.label: Peel the banana
steps.altText: A child peels the banana and smiles.

steps.label: Take a bite
steps.altText: A child starts to eat the peeled banana.

steps.label: Finished eating
steps.altText: A child looks pleased after eating the banana.

steps.label: Egg in the nest
steps.altText: An egg rests in a straw nest.

steps.label: The shell cracks
steps.altText: The egg starts to crack open in the nest.

steps.label: The chick appears
steps.altText: A yellow chick peeks out from the broken shell.

steps.label: The chick stands up
steps.altText: A newly hatched chick stands beside its broken shell.

steps.label: Collect sticks
steps.altText: A child carries sticks through the woods.

steps.label: Build the fire
steps.altText: A child and an adult place sticks onto a campfire.

steps.label: Toast the marshmallow
steps.altText: A child holds a marshmallow over the fire on a stick.

steps.label: Eat the marshmallow
steps.altText: A child eats the toasted marshmallow.
